description: A governance regression corrupted country normalization in both master data and flagship hotel records for UK/Netherlands coverage. Use OrientDB Studio at http://localhost:2480/studio/index.html with server credentials root / GymAnything123! and connect to demodb. Restore canonical values for the affected country and hotel records, re-establish a UNIQUE constraint on Countries.Name, and produce a remediation audit trail in GovernanceFixLog with the required issue keys and ownership.
